title: Riha Archipelago
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Riha Archipelago''' was a group of inhabited islands on [[Rellnas Minor]]. [[Nanilas]] was the root language of the eight different languages spoken by the [[Rellarin]] people who lived in the Riha Archipelago.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-09-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 12: Aliens — Enemies and Allies]]''
